title: May 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 12''' is the 132nd day of the year (133rd in leap years). There are 233 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Jacob Witkin]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Sara Kestelman]] is born.
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[L. Neil Smith]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[John Chapman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Deborah Kara Unger]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Melleny Brown]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Anna Graves]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Domhnall Gleeson]] is born.
*1983 – [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi'' novel]] published.
*1983 – ''[[The Star Wars Question & Answer Book About Computers]]'' published.
*[[1986]] – [[Eugene Cordero]] is born.
*[[1987]] – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' published.
*[[1992]] – [[Varada Sethu]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Nightmare Machine]]'' published.
*1997 – ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – Advance ticket sales begin for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 2]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Lucasfilm Animation]] is founded.
*2003 – [[Star Wars Insider 68|''Star Wars Insider'' 68]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2004]] – [[Empire 19|''Empire'' 19]] published.
*[[2006]] – "[[Firepower]]" made available on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2009]] – "[[The Battle of Turak IV]]" is added to [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Scanimation Book]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic (2021) 5|''The High Republic'' (2021) 5]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars (2020) 13|''Star Wars'' (2020) 13]] published.
*[[2023]] – "[[Get Well Nubs / The Junk Giant]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Out of the Darkness]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Secrets of the Jedi: The Chronicles of Luke Skywalker]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Secrets of the Sith: The Chronicles of Emperor Palpatine]]'' to be published.
